description_long: This is a dark, weathered wooden house with a prominent gable roof and a small central cupola on top. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. The house features a covered porch supported by posts, accessible via a set of stairs and a ramp, suggesting accessibility. Windows are symmetrically placed on the sides, with a larger set of windows on one end, likely indicating a living area. The foundation appears to be made of stone or concrete blocks, elevating the structure above ground level. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements, evoking a rural or early American vernacular style.
description: A weathered wooden house with a gable roof, central cupola, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, elevated on a stone foundation.
description_view_0: Side view showing two windows, the covered porch with stairs and ramp, and the central cupola above the roof.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the large set of windows, the gable roof, and the cupola centered above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two windows and the porch extending from the right, cupola visible on the roof.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway with a covered porch, ramp, and stairs, as well as the cupola and a single window above.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a large window grouping on one end
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps and ramp, supported by posts, simple door with minimal ornamentation
